korean.politics: 6·3 지방선거 이틀이 지난 가운데 여야 모두 선거 결과 분석과 당내 쇄신 작업에 들어갔다. 이재명 정부는 선거 결과를 민생 정책 강화 신호로 받아들이고 부동산·물가 안정 대책을 조기 추진하기로 했다.
korean.economy: 코스피가 AI 반도체 수요 기대감에 힘입어 강세를 이어가고 있다. 선거 후 정책 방향에 대한 불확실성이 줄어들면서 외국인 투자자들의 매수세가 재개됐다. 7월 세제 개편안을 앞두고 부동산 시장의 관망세가 두드러졌다.
korean.society: FIFA 월드컵 개막(6월 11일)을 엿새 앞두고 한국 대표팀이 현지 적응 훈련에 집중하고 있다. 에볼라 관련 입국 검역이 미국·캐나다·멕시코 등 월드컵 개최국을 중심으로 강화됐다.
korean.international: 미국과 이란의 협상이 간접 채널을 통해 지속되고 있다. 60일 휴전 연장·호르무즈 기뢰 제거·미국 봉쇄 해제를 골자로 한 잠정합의 초안이 거의 완성 단계에 다가선 것으로 전해졌다. 콩고민주공화국에서 에볼라 대응 강화를 위한 국제 지원이 속도를 냈다.
korean.tech: 2026 FIFA 월드컵이 6일 후 개막하며 전 세계적 관심이 집중되고 있다. 한국은 6월 11일 첫 경기에서 체코와 맞붙는다. AI 데이터센터 투자 확대와 HBM 수요 증가로 국내 반도체 업종 주가가 상승 흐름을 이어가고 있다.

english.politics: Two days after South Korea's June 3 local elections, both major parties entered internal post-election reviews. The Lee Jae-myung administration interpreted the results as a mandate to accelerate grassroots economic policies, committing to an early rollout of measures to stabilize real estate prices and consumer costs.
english.economy: The KOSPI extended its rally, supported by strong AI chip demand expectations. As post-election policy uncertainty receded, foreign investors resumed buying. The real estate market remained in a wait-and-see mode ahead of the government's July tax reform announcement.
english.society: With the FIFA World Cup opening in six days, South Korea's national football team focused on acclimatization training at its North American camp. Entry health screenings were reinforced at the three World Cup host nations — the U.S., Canada, and Mexico — to guard against Ebola.
english.international: U.S.-Iran negotiations continued through indirect channels. A draft deal featuring a 60-day ceasefire extension, mine clearance in the Strait of Hormuz within 30 days, and a full U.S. blockade lift was reported to be near finalization. International support for the Ebola response in the DRC accelerated as cases approached 1,000.
english.tech: The 2026 FIFA World Cup opens in six days, drawing unprecedented global attention as the first 48-team edition of the tournament. South Korea faces Czechia in its opening match on June 11. Domestic semiconductor stocks continued their upward trend, driven by expanding AI data center investment and rising HBM demand.

vocabulary.example: The Lee administration interpreted the election results as a mandate to accelerate grassroots economic policies.
The government committed to an early rollout of measures to stabilize real estate prices.
As post-election policy uncertainty receded, foreign investors resumed buying.
The real estate market remained in a wait-and-see mode ahead of the July tax reform.
South Korea's football team focused on acclimatization training at its North American camp.
The draft ceasefire deal was reported to be near finalization.

sentences.sentence: The Lee Jae-myung administration interpreted the results as a mandate to accelerate grassroots economic policies, committing to an early rollout of measures to stabilize real estate prices and consumer costs.
sentences.point: 'interpret A as B'는 'A를 B로 해석하다'는 표현. 'committing to + 명사'는 의지를 표명하는 분사 구조.
sentences.similar: The board interpreted the shareholder vote as a mandate to pursue aggressive expansion, committing to a three-year investment plan.

sentences.sentence: As post-election policy uncertainty receded, foreign investors resumed buying.
sentences.point: 'recede(물러나다)'는 불확실성·우려가 줄어들 때 쓰는 표현. 'resume + 동사-ing'는 '~을 재개하다'는 뜻.
sentences.similar: As inflation fears receded, central banks resumed cutting interest rates.

sentences.sentence: A draft deal featuring a 60-day ceasefire extension, mine clearance in the Strait of Hormuz within 30 days, and a full U.S. blockade lift was reported to be near finalization.
sentences.point: 'be reported to be + 형용사'는 '~한 것으로 전해졌다'는 간접 인용 구조. 'featuring + 열거'는 합의 내용을 나열.
sentences.similar: A merger agreement featuring an all-stock deal, a leadership transition plan, and joint headquarters in Singapore was reported to be near completion.

expressions.usage: 불확실한 상황에서 섣불리 행동하지 않고 결과를 기다리는 태도를 표현
expressions.example: With the Fed decision just days away, investors stayed in wait-and-see mode, avoiding large positions.

expressions.usage: 선거·투표 결과를 특정 정책 방향에 대한 지지 신호로 읽을 때 사용하는 정치 기사 표현
expressions.example: The prime minister interpreted her landslide win as a mandate to push through the controversial pension reform.

expressions.usage: 투자자들이 잠시 멈췄다가 다시 주식을 사기 시작할 때 사용하는 금융 기사 표현
expressions.example: Foreign investors resumed buying Korean equities after the election uncertainty cleared.

challenge.korean: 선거 후 정책 불확실성이 줄어들면서 외국인 투자자들이 매수세를 재개했다.
challenge.answer: As post-election policy uncertainty receded, foreign investors resumed buying.
challenge.explanation: 'as + 절'은 원인·배경을 표현하는 접속사. 'recede(줄어들다, 물러나다)'는 uncertainty·tension·concern 등과 잘 어울리는 동사. 'resume buying'은 '매수 재개'를 나타내는 금융 기사 핵심 표현.
